name: sprint
description: Full sprint team: plan → design → implement → QA → review

roles.description: Breaks down the user story into actionable tasks, defines acceptance criteria, prioritizes scope
Designs technical approach, defines interfaces, identifies risks and dependencies
Implements the feature based on PM scope and architect spec, writes unit tests
Tests the implementation: functional tests, edge cases, regression, integration
Final code review: correctness, security, performance, test coverage, documentation. Creates fix tasks for blocking findings.

tasks.title: Break down user story into tasks with acceptance criteria
Design technical approach, interfaces, and risk assessment
Implement the feature with unit tests
Test implementation: functional, edge cases, regression
Final review: correctness, security, performance, docs
